tooltip.productivefrogs.catalyst.apply: Drop into a Slime Milk source to apply
tooltip.productivefrogs.catalyst.count: More slime spawns before it runs dry
item.productivefrogs.slime_bucket.glow_i: Bucket of Glow Ink Sac Slime
item.productivefrogs.slime_bucket.quartz: Bucket of Quartz Enriched Iron Slime
item.productivefrogs.slime_bucket.wither: Bucket of Wither Skeleton Skull Slime
item.productivefrogs.resource_slime_spaw: Glow Ink Sac Slime Spawn Egg
Quartz Enriched Iron Slime Spawn Egg
Wither Skeleton Skull Slime Spawn Egg
productivefrogs.jei.variant_slime.info: A %1$s. Killed by a %2$s, drops a Froglight stamped with this variant. Use the Slime Milker to convert into a Slime Milk bucket for infinite renewable production.
productivefrogs.jei.variant_froglight.in: Dropped when a %1$s eats a %2$s. Smelts in a furnace to the resource it represents.
productivefrogs.jei.frog.info: Eats %1$s variants. When fed a variant Resource Slime (e.g. an Iron Slime), drops a Froglight stamped with that variant. Category-only slimes are intermediates and produce nothing.
productivefrogs.jei.tadpole.info: Matures into a %1$s while in water.
productivefrogs.jei.frog_egg.info: Place on water to spawn a Primed Frog Egg block. After a delay, hatches into 1-3 Tadpoles that mature into %1$s.
productivefrogs.jei.primed_egg.info: Hatches after a delay into 1-3 Tadpoles that mature into %1$s. Must be placed on a water source.
productivefrogs.jei.slime_milk.info: Place in the world to create a Slime Milk source block. Periodically spawns a %1$s on a solid adjacent block. The output of feeding a variant Slime Bucket into the Slime Milker.
productivefrogs.jei.parent_species.bog.i: Spawns in swamps and mangrove swamps. Infuse with a variant primer (clay, mud, moss, dirt, leather, etc.) to convert into a variant Resource Slime that frogs can eat.
Spawns in dripstone caves, deep dark, and lush caves. Infuse with a variant primer (iron ingot, copper ingot, gold ingot, redstone, coal, etc.) to convert into a variant Resource Slime.
productivefrogs.jei.parent_species.geode: Spawns in mountain peaks (stony, jagged, frozen) and snowy slopes. Infuse with a gem primer (amethyst shard, diamond, emerald, lapis lazuli, calcite, or tuff) to convert into a variant Resource Slime.
Spawns in oceans (deep, warm, lukewarm). Infuse with a prismarine shard or sponge to convert into a variant Resource Slime.
productivefrogs.jei.parent_species.infer: Spawns in the Nether (nether wastes, basalt deltas, soul sand valley). Infuse with magma cream to convert into a variant Resource Slime.
Spawns in the End (outer islands). Infuse with an ender pearl to convert into a variant Resource Slime.
productivefrogs.jei.empty_frog_egg.info: Bottle a vanilla frogspawn block (right-click with a glass bottle) to fill this. Prime the resulting filled bottle with a variant primer item to assign a species.
productivefrogs.jei.slime_milker.info: Furnace-style production block. Right-click to open. Place a Slime Bucket containing a variant Resource Slime in the input slot — after 100 ticks, it converts to the matching Slime Milk bucket. Hopper-compatible.
productivefrogs.jei.slime_churn.info: The Milker's inverse. Load a Slime Milk bucket and empty buckets: the Churn spawns that variant's slimes straight into the buckets, on the same schedule and budget as placed Slime Milk - catalysts included. The spent milk container returns in the lower output slot. Hopper-compatible.
productivefrogs.jei.spawnery.info: Turns glass bottles into bottled frogspawn, fueled by slime balls (one ball per bottle). A primer is required: a slime ball primes plain vanilla frogspawn, or a species primer (iron ingot for Cave, amethyst shard for Geode, clay ball for Bog, prismarine shard for Tide, blaze powder for Infernal, an ender pearl for Void) primes that species' eggs. Off by default; modpacks can retune the species primers.
productivefrogs.jei.count_catalyst.info: Toss into a placed Slime Milk source to extend it: adds spawns to the source's remaining count. Stack as many as you like - count is uncapped. The buff is saved to the source and survives re-bucketing.
productivefrogs.jei.speed_catalyst.info: Toss into a placed Slime Milk source to speed it up: each one shortens the time between slime spawns, up to a cap. The buff is saved to the source and survives re-bucketing.
productivefrogs.jei.quantity_catalyst.in: Toss into a placed Slime Milk source to widen each spawn: each one adds another slime per spawn, up to a cap. The buff is saved to the source and survives re-bucketing.
productivefrogs.jei.infinite_catalyst.in: Toss into a placed Slime Milk source to make it never run dry. Built from Count catalysts - the final tier of the count line. Saved to the source and survives re-bucketing.
productivefrogs.jei.empty_slime_bucket.i: Right-click a size-1 Resource Slime to capture it. The bucket records the slime's variant (or species, for category-only slimes) and can be released elsewhere or fed into the Slime Milker.
productivefrogs.jei.empty_tadpole_bucket: Right-click a Resource Tadpole to capture it. The bucket records the tadpole's species and can be released elsewhere — released tadpoles will continue maturing into a Resource Frog.
